title: buddleja officinalis f. albiflora
intro: Buddleja officinalis f. albiflora, also known as White Butterfly Bush, is a flowering plant species within the Buddleja genus, native to China. Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, Buddleja officinalis f. albiflora is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, coughs, and respiratory problems, offering health benefits like reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of Buddleja officinalis f. albiflora include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of certain conditions.
